sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: MasterCraft Boat Holdings to Acquire Marine Products Corporation in $232.2 Million Cash and Stock Deal
feed.summary: MasterCraft Boat Holdings, Inc. announced its acquisition of Marine Products Corporation in a transaction valued at $232.2 million, consisting of both cash and stock. King & Spalding advised MasterCraft Boat Holdings on this deal. Further details about the transaction or the roles of other legal counsel were reserved for members.

feed.title: GSK Ties 2026 Executive Share Awards to Growth, Pipeline and TSR Benchmarks
feed.summary: GSK has set new performance share awards for its senior leaders for 2026, with vesting period from 2026 to 2028. These awards are heavily weighted on relative Total Shareholder Return (TSR), alongside specific targets for sales, profit, pipeline sustainability and ESG metrics. This strategy aims to align executive compensation with the company's long-term growth, R&D effectiveness, and responsible business practices.

feed.title: GSK ties executive bonuses more tightly to long-term equity performance
feed.summary: GSK has implemented a new policy tying executive bonuses more closely to long-term equity performance. Executive directors and senior leaders will defer a significant portion of their annual bonuses into company shares for three years, aligning their incentives with shareholder value. The awards were issued on February 12, 2026, as restricted ADSs or nil-cost options, reinforcing GSK's focus on pay-for-performance.

feed.title: Kontoor Brands: Junior Achievement of The Triad Inspires Future Careers Through Real-World Connections
feed.summary: The Kontoor Brands Foundation partnered with Junior Achievement of the Triad to offer workforce readiness experiences to students at Lincoln Middle School and Dudley High School. These programs combined classroom learning, career exploration, and mentorship from Kontoor Brands volunteers, helping students gain essential workplace skills and envision their future careers. The initiative aims to bridge the gap between education and real-world opportunities, fostering confidence and motivation among young people.

feed.title: NeoGenomics Announces Launch of New Cancer Assay PanTracer Pro
feed.summary: NeoGenomics has launched PanTracer Pro, a new pan-solid tumor assay designed to simplify molecular testing for clinicians and help in making informed treatment decisions for patients with advanced solid tumors. This assay combines broad DNA and RNA sequencing with tumor-specific ancillary testing, aiming to reduce diagnostic complexity and turnaround time. The company anticipates this new offering will contribute to continued double-digit sales growth in 2026, building on previous revenue uptrends.

feed.title: 17 new cruise ships on the way as Norwegian maps trips to 2037
feed.summary: Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings (NCLH) has signed an agreement with Fincantieri for three new cruise ships, one for each of its brands, to be delivered between 2036 and 2037. This order expands NCLH's newbuild pipeline to 17 ships and is expected to contribute to a 4% compound annual growth rate in capacity from 2026 to 2037. The company plans to use Export Credit Agency financing for the majority of the vessel costs, minimizing near-term financial impact.

feed.title: Edison International to Release Q4 Earnings: What's in Store?
feed.summary: Edison International (EIX) is set to release its fourth-quarter 2025 earnings on February 18, with strong expectations for growth driven by infrastructure investments, a new rate structure, and retroactive revenue collections. The company is predicted to beat earnings estimates, with a Zacks Rank #3 and an Earnings ESP of +8.65%. Other utility stocks like Alliant Energy, Consolidated Edison, and AES Corporation also show potential for earnings beats.

feed.title: Salesforce Inc (CRM) Strengthens Outlook with AI and Big Deals
feed.summary: Salesforce Inc (CRM) is viewed as a strong long-term investment by analysts at Morgan Stanley and Stifel, despite recent software stock selloffs. Analysts believe the market is underestimating Salesforce's ability to benefit from AI adoption through initiatives like Agentforce. The company recently secured a significant 10-year, $5.6 billion deal with the U.S. Army, further bolstering its outlook.

feed.title: ServiceNow Inc (NOW) Draws Analyst Attention Amid AI Shift
feed.summary: ServiceNow Inc (NOW) is gaining analyst attention as the software industry shifts towards AI, despite recent valuation drops. Morgan Stanley sees buying opportunities in software, including ServiceNow, noting that generative AI worries are overstated and established vendors can benefit. Meanwhile, Truist cut ServiceNow's price target but maintained a Buy rating, emphasizing the growing importance of AI stories over near-term fundamentals, especially as seat-based models underperform.

feed.title: GreenPower Motor regains compliance with Nasdaq listing requirements
feed.summary: GreenPower Motor Company Inc. has regained compliance with Nasdaq's listing requirements after undertaking several financial transactions, including equity offerings and securing term loans. Despite this, the company will remain under a Panel monitor for one year and has a "WEAK" financial health rating according to InvestingPro. GreenPower designs and manufactures all-electric medium and heavy-duty vehicles and is scheduled to report earnings soon.

feed.title: The AI Paradox: Analyzing Super Micro Computer’s (SMCI) Record Revenue and Margin Reckoning
feed.summary: Super Micro Computer (SMCI) is at a critical juncture, reporting record-shattering revenue of $12.7 billion, driven by the AI boom, but also facing a severe "margin collapse" to 6.4%. The company's unique liquid-cooling technology and rapid production capabilities position it as an indispensable architect of AI infrastructure, yet it grapples with governance challenges, DOJ probes, and intense competition fromDell and HPE. Its future hinges on resolving legal issues, stabilizing margins, and navigating component dependency while leveraging opportunities in the NVIDIA Blackwell ramp and a $40 billion revenue target.

feed.title: The AI Inflection Point: A Deep Dive into Expedia Group (EXPE) and the Future of Travel Booking
feed.summary: Expedia Group (EXPE) is facing significant market anxiety due to potential AI disruption, despite strong operational fundamentals. The company's stock declined 6.7% after its latest earnings report, driven by cautious forward guidance and investor concerns about AI-driven displacement in the online travel agency space. Expedia aims to transform into an AI-first technology provider, with a focus on its B2B segment, international expansion, and innovative AI-powered tools like Romie, as it navigates a competitive landscape dominated by Booking Holdings, Airbnb, and Google.

feed.title: Inside the Citation Ascend simulator bringing lifelike training to jet pilots
feed.summary: TRU Simulation + Training Inc., a Textron Inc. company, announced that its Full Flight Simulator (FFS) for the Cessna Citation Ascend has achieved Federal Aviation Administration (FAA) Level D qualification, significantly enhancing advanced training options for midsize jet pilots. This development provides an immersive and realistic training environment on the recently FAA-certified Citation Ascend, with European Union Aviation Safety Agency (EASA) qualification anticipated in 2026. The simulator features advanced technologies including TRU Simulation’s REALCue motion system and high-definition visual displays, ensuring pilots can build confidence and precision.

feed.title: TRU Simulation’s Full Flight Simulator for the Cessna Citation Ascend Achieves FAA Qualification, Expanding Advanced Training for Midsize Jet Pilots – Company Announcement - FT.com
feed.summary: TRU Simulation + Training Inc. announced that its Full Flight Simulator (FFS) for the Cessna Citation Ascend has achieved Federal Aviation Administration (FAA) Level D qualification. This development significantly enhances advanced training options for midsize jet pilots by providing a highly realistic training environment. The company anticipates European Union Aviation Safety Agency (EASA) qualification in 2026, which will further extend the simulator's global reach.

feed.title: New microgrids to keep Northern New Mexico powered during extreme events
feed.summary: PowerSecure is partnering with Kit Carson Electric Cooperative (KCEC) to construct three microgrids with battery energy storage systems in Northern New Mexico. This project, totaling 7.5 MW of BESS (38.25 MWh) across Taos Ski Valley, El Rito West, and Penasco, aims to enhance grid resilience against extreme weather and wildfires. The microgrids will support critical infrastructure during extended outages and enable public safety power shutoffs while maintaining local power loads.

feed.title: 3M appoints Meagan Linn as Senior Vice President, Government Affairs
feed.summary: 3M has appointed Meagan Linn as its Senior Vice President, Government Affairs. In her new role, Linn will be responsible for overseeing the company's engagement with government bodies, policymakers, regulatory agencies, and industry associations globally, as well as developing business growth through government contracts. She brings 20 years of public policy experience, including 12 years at Northrop Grumman Corporation and 8 years on Capitol Hill.

feed.title: L3Harris Receives New Contract to Power THAAD Interceptors
feed.summary: L3Harris Technologies secured a new contract worth nearly $400 million to supply solid rocket boost motors and Liquid Divert and Attitude Control Systems (LDACS) for the Missile Defense Agency’s THAAD system. This system is crucial for intercepting short, medium, and intermediate-range missiles, boasting a 100% success rate in tests. L3Harris manufactures these critical components in Alabama, Arkansas, and Los Angeles, reinforcing its role in national security.

feed.title: Blackstone-led group invests $600m in Indian AI cloud Neysa
feed.summary: A Blackstone-led group, including Teachers' Venture Growth, TVS Capital, 360 ONE, and Nexus, is investing $600 million in Indian AI cloud startup Neysa Networks. Neysa is also seeking an additional $600 million in debt financing, bringing the total capital commitment to $1.2 billion. The funds will be used to acquire and deploy over 20,000 GPUs in India, furthering the company's goal of building production-grade AI infrastructure within the country.

feed.title: Insurance moves: Markel, Willis, Gallagher
feed.summary: Markel, Willis (a WTW business), and Gallagher have announced senior leadership changes to sharpen their focus on specialty lines and analytics. Markel appointed John Bang as head of Korea and Japan and added two underwriters to its PFR and cyber team in Greater China. Willis named Michelle Ng as head of Risk & Analytics for the Pacific, while Gallagher expanded Hassan Ashtari's leadership role for its ADGM alternative risk joint venture.

feed.title: Huntington Ingalls Industries (HII) is Unlocking Its Growth Potential
feed.summary: Sound Shore Management highlighted Huntington Ingalls Industries (HII) as a top contributor in its Q4 2025 investor letter. The firm initially purchased HII stock, noting its undervaluation and significant backlog growth following post-COVID recovery. Despite HII's strong performance, Sound Shore Management suggests that certain AI stocks may offer even higher potential returns in a shorter timeframe.

feed.title: IBM vs. Intel: Which AI-Focused Stock is the Better Buy Today?
feed.summary: This article compares IBM (International Business Machines Corporation) and Intel (Intel Corporation), analyzing which AI-focused stock presents a better investment opportunity today. While both companies are tech legacy firms focusing on emerging technologies like AI and cloud computing, IBM appears to be a better pick due to its strong hybrid cloud and AI demand, stable revenue growth, and relatively lower valuation compared to Intel, despite Intel's recent strong price performance. The analysis relies on Zacks Rank and future earnings estimates for 2026.

feed.title: FFIV INVESTOR DEADLINE APPROACHING: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP Reminds F5 (FFIV) Investors of Securities Class Action Deadline on February 17, 2026
feed.summary: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is reminding investors of F5 (FFIV) that the deadline to seek the role of lead plaintiff in a federal securities class action is February 17, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that F5 and its executives made misleading statements and failed to disclose a significant security breach affecting its high-revenue BIG-IP product, which negatively impacted sales and renewals. Investors who bought F5 securities between October 28, 2024, and October 27, 2025, and suffered losses are encouraged to contact the law firm.

feed.title: FFIV Investors Have Opportunity to Lead F5, Inc. Securities Fraud Lawsuit with the Schall Law Firm
feed.summary: The Schall Law Firm has announced a class action lawsuit against F5, Inc. (NASDAQ: FFIV) for alleged securities fraud during the period of October 28, 2024, to October 27, 2025. Investors who purchased F5 securities during this "Class Period" are encouraged to contact the firm to potentially lead the lawsuit, which claims the company made false and misleading statements about the strength and security of its services. The complaint suggests a security incident put customer needs and growth prospects at risk, causing investor damages when the truth emerged.

feed.title: IBM vs. Intel: Which AI-Focused Stock is the Better Buy Today?
feed.summary: This article compares IBM (IBM) and Intel (INTC) as AI-focused investment options. It delves into each company's strengths and weaknesses in areas like cloud computing, AI, and semiconductor manufacturing, citing Zacks Consensus Estimates for sales and EPS. Ultimately, it concludes that IBM appears to be a better investment due to its superior Zacks Rank, improving earnings estimate revisions, stable free cash flow, and strong portfolio mix.

feed.title: Western Digital has exhausted its HDD production capacity for the entire year of 2026 due to the AI boom
feed.summary: Western Digital has completely sold out its HDD production capacity for the entire year of 2026, driven primarily by the high demand from AI hyperscalers and corporate clients. The cloud segment now accounts for 89% of the company's total revenue, with HDDs remaining the most economical solution for large-scale data storage required by AI. This early booking in February 2026 highlights the significant impact of the AI boom on data storage infrastructure.

feed.title: Salesforce Isn't Going Anywhere. The SaaS Apocalypse Is Overdone (NYSE:CRM)
feed.summary: JR Research maintains a Buy rating on Salesforce (CRM), arguing that fears of a "SaaS apocalypse" and AI-driven disruption are overblown. Despite widespread software sector pessimism, Salesforce is trading at just 15x forward earnings and demonstrates strong fundamentals with over 30% free cash flow margins and deep enterprise integration. The company's Agentforce platform is also gaining significant traction, further solidifying its market position.

feed.title: 3 Fidelity ETFs to Buy in February and Hold for a Decade (Or Longer)
feed.summary: This article recommends three Fidelity ETFs for long-term investors: Fidelity Fundamental Large Cap Growth ETF (FFLG) emphasizing fundamentals and growth, Fidelity High Dividend ETF (FDVV) for passive income and international diversification, and Fidelity Enhanced New India ETF (FENI) for exposure to India's high-growth economy. The author highlights each ETF's strategy, benefits, and suitability for a decade-long investment horizon.

feed.title: CarMax named one of TIME’s America’s Most Iconic Companies
feed.summary: CarMax has been recognized by TIME Magazine as one of "America’s Most Iconic Companies" in a project celebrating the United States' 250th anniversary. The used car retailer was honored for its long-standing dedication to transparent and customer-centric experiences, including its "no-haggle" pricing model which revolutionized car buying. This recognition highlights CarMax's significant impact on American business, culture, and identity.

feed.title: GoDaddy Inc. to Present at the Morgan Stanley Technology, Media & Telecom Conference
feed.summary: GoDaddy Inc. (NYSE: GDDY) announced that its Chief Financial Officer, Mark McCaffrey, will present at the Morgan Stanley Technology, Media & Telecom Conference on March 2, 2026. The presentation will take place in San Francisco, California, at 11:30 a.m. ET, and a live audio webcast and replay will be available on GoDaddy's Investor Relations website. The company, known as the world's largest domain name registrar, assists entrepreneurs globally in starting and scaling their businesses, utilizing tools like GoDaddy Airo® for online presence, traffic generation, and sales boosting.

feed.title: S&P Global: An Undervalued Dividend King For Long-Term Investors (SPGI)
feed.summary: S&P Global (SPGI) is highlighted as an undervalued Dividend King provider of credit ratings, benchmarks, and analytics. The article notes its 53-year dividend growth streak and strong financial position with a low debt/equity ratio and high interest coverage. It suggests SPGI's current valuation makes it an attractive long-term investment despite potential risks.

feed.title: Consumers Energy Promotes Home Heating Credit to Help Customers Pay Energy Bills – Company Announcement
feed.summary: Consumers Energy is encouraging its customers to apply for the Michigan Home Heating Credit this tax season, which provides an average benefit of nearly $200 to eligible households. This initiative aims to help families manage rising costs, especially after a recent cold snap led to higher energy bills. The company is also providing $5 million to nonprofit organizations for energy bill assistance and reaching out to customers most affected by the cold to help with payments and energy reduction.

feed.title: L3Harris To Begin Modification Work on Korean AEW&C Global 6500s
feed.summary: L3Harris Technologies has begun modification work on the first two of four Bombardier Global Express 6500 business jets for the Republic of Korea Air Force. These aircraft will be missionized for Airborne Early Warning and Control (AEW&C) purposes. The company is integrating mission systems on these jets, which will ultimately serve as crucial assets for South Korea's airborne surveillance capabilities.

feed.title: Oracle Lawsuits And Air Force Win Pull AI Cloud Story In Tension
feed.summary: Oracle (NYSE:ORCL) is facing multiple class-action lawsuits alleging misrepresentations regarding AI infrastructure spending and revenue growth expectations, while simultaneously securing an $88 million cloud contract with the U.S. Air Force. These contrasting developments create tension for investors, highlighting both legal scrutiny and continued demand for Oracle's cloud services in government and enterprise sectors. The situation compels investors to closely monitor Oracle's disclosures, capital deployment, and AI infrastructure plans as it navigates these challenges and opportunities.

feed.title: VanEck Natural Resources Fund Approaches Peak Ahead of Portfolio Reshuffle
feed.summary: The VanEck Natural Resources ETF is nearing its 52-week high due to robust global demand for industrial and energy commodities. Investors are keenly awaiting next month's portfolio rebalancing, which will adjust holdings based on market performance, with a focus on target allocations for energy, metals, agriculture, and sustainable resources. The fund utilizes a global investment strategy and a tiered weighting methodology to balance traditional and renewable segments, distinguishing itself from competitors.

feed.title: Here's How to Play Kinross Gold Stock Before Q4 Earnings Release
feed.summary: Kinross Gold Corporation (KGC) is set to report its Q4 2025 earnings on February 18, with analysts expecting a significant year-over-year increase in earnings and revenue, driven by higher gold prices. The company is predicted to beat earnings expectations, boasting a positive Earnings ESP and a Zacks Rank #3. Despite strong performance and a promising pipeline of projects, Kinross faces headwinds from rising production costs, which could impact profit margins.

feed.title: RTX Corporation Stock (RTX) Opinions on Quarterly Earnings Beat
feed.summary: RTX Corporation reported better-than-expected quarterly earnings, leading to investor optimism due to strong defense spending and a solid backlog in aerospace and missiles. Despite some concerns about supply chain disruptions, the overall market sentiment highlighted the company's resilience and strategic advantages in advanced weaponry. Analysts have largely issued "Buy" ratings, with a median price target of $211.5, suggesting shares are attractively priced post-rally.

feed.title: Virginie Helias: Community Impact at Procter & Gamble
feed.summary: Virginie Helias, Procter & Gamble's Chief Sustainability Officer, has been recognized among the top sustainability leaders for her 37-year career dedicated to embedding sustainability into the company's operations. Her focus includes reducing environmental impact and supporting communities through health and hygiene initiatives. She will speak at Sustainability LIVE: The Net Zero Summit about the evolving role of CSOs.

feed.title: Tractor Supply Announces a Flock of Animal-Friendly Festivities Launching This Month
feed.summary: Tractor Supply Company is launching a series of animal-focused events in February, including their annual Chick Days, the new Animal Days savings celebration, and a nationwide Farm Bash. These events offer savings, supplies, and activities for pet and animal owners, with the Farm Bash celebrating the start of Animal Days on February 21st in stores across the country.

feed.title: Microsoft Teams class action claims company illegally collects voice data
feed.summary: Five Illinois residents have filed a class action lawsuit against Microsoft Corp., alleging that its Microsoft Teams software illegally collects and analyzes users' voice data without proper notice. The lawsuit claims that the software's real-time transcription feature uses "diarization" to create "voiceprints" from users' voices, violating the Illinois Biometric Privacy Act (BIPA). The plaintiffs are seeking actual damages or $1,000 per negligent violation, potentially rising to $5,000 for intentional or reckless violations.

feed.title: Preview: Vulcan Materials's Earnings
feed.summary: Vulcan Materials (NYSE: VMC) is set to announce its quarterly earnings on February 17, 2026, with analysts forecasting an EPS of $2.12. Investors are keen to see if the company surpasses estimates and provides positive guidance for the next quarter, as market reactions are often driven more by guidance than past performance. The company's stock has seen a 20.12% increase over the past 52 weeks, demonstrating positive returns for long-term shareholders.

feed.title: FirstEnergy Transmission and Transource Energy Joint Venture Receive Approval for Major Electric Transmission Project in Central Ohio
feed.summary: FirstEnergy Transmission and Transource Energy have received approval from PJM Interconnection for a significant electric transmission project in central Ohio. This joint venture, named Grid Growth Ventures LLC, will develop over 300 miles of new 765-kilovolt lines and substation upgrades to enhance grid capacity, reliability, and support economic growth in the rapidly expanding Columbus region. The project aims to provide more reliable service, attract new businesses, stabilize energy costs, and leverage the expertise of both companies in extra-high voltage transmission development.

feed.title: U.S. Bancorp's (NYSE:USB) institutional investors lost 4.4% last week but have benefitted from longer-term gains
feed.summary: Institutional investors own 82% of U.S. Bancorp (NYSE:USB) and experienced a 4.4% loss last week, though they have seen a 26% return over the past year. The Vanguard Group is the largest shareholder with 9.4% ownership, and the top 23 investors collectively hold 50% of the company. Insiders own less than 1% of the shares, while the general public holds a 17% stake.

feed.title: CONAGRA BRANDS REAFFIRMS FISCAL 2026 GUIDANCE AHEAD OF 2026 CAGNY PRESENTATION
feed.summary: Conagra Brands Inc. is reaffirming its fiscal 2026 guidance ahead of its presentation at the 2026 Consumer Analyst Group of New York (CAGNY) conference. The company expects organic net sales change of (1)% to 1% compared to fiscal 2025, adjusted operating margin between ~11.0% and ~11.5%, and adjusted EPS between $1.70 and $1.85. Additionally, Conagra now anticipates free cash flow conversion to be approximately 100% for the full year, an increase from its previous expectation.

feed.title: CONAGRA BRANDS REAFFIRMS FISCAL 2026 GUIDANCE AHEAD OF 2026 CAGNY PRESENTATION
feed.summary: Conagra Brands, Inc. is reaffirming its fiscal 2026 guidance ahead of its presentation at the 2026 Consumer Analyst Group of New York (CAGNY) conference. The company expects organic net sales change of (1)% to 1% compared to fiscal 2025, adjusted operating margin between ~11.0% and ~11.5%, and adjusted EPS between $1.70 and $1.85. Additionally, Conagra anticipates free cash flow conversion to be approximately 100% for the full year, an increase from its previous expectation of around 90%.

feed.title: O'Reilly Automotive's (NASDAQ:ORLY) five-year earnings growth trails the 26% YoY shareholder returns
feed.summary: O'Reilly Automotive's stock price has seen an impressive 217% increase over the last five years, outperforming its earnings per share (EPS) growth of 14% per year during the same period. This suggests that the market holds the company in high regard, anticipating continued growth. While CEO remuneration is reasonable, investors are encouraged to further examine the company's fundamentals for future growth potential.

feed.title: New 765-kV power lines could serve 2M homes near Columbus
feed.summary: FirstEnergy Transmission and Transource Energy have received approval from the PJM Board to jointly develop a major electric transmission project in central Ohio. This project will include over 300 miles of new 765-kV lines and substation upgrades, aiming to enhance reliability, support growing demand in the Columbus region, and attract new industry. The collaboration, through Grid Growth Ventures LLC, is designed to reduce land use and deliver cost-effective solutions for the region's increasing power needs.

feed.title: Lloyds Banking Group - Publication of a Supplementary Prospectus
feed.summary: Lloyds Banking Group plc has announced the publication of a new Supplementary Prospectus dated February 16, 2026, which has been approved by the Financial Conduct Authority. This document relates to their £25,000,000,000 Euro Medium Term Note Programme and should be read alongside previous prospectuses. The announcement also includes contact information for investor relations, corporate treasury, and corporate affairs, and specifies important disclaimers regarding intended addressees and securities distribution.

feed.title: Icon PLC headcount plummets 1,800 in a year amid ‘strong cost control’
feed.summary: The article reports that Icon PLC's headcount has decreased by 1,800 over the past year due to "strong cost control" measures. This significant reduction suggests a strategic effort to manage expenses and optimize operations within the company.

feed.title: AI-run Wi‑Fi 7 to manage crowds, cut power use at Atlético’s stadium
feed.summary: Atlético de Madrid is modernizing its Riyadh Air Metropolitano Stadium with HPE Networking technology, implementing an AI-driven Wi-Fi 7 network. This upgrade includes over 1,500 AI-managed access points to optimize performance based on crowd density, reduce energy consumption, and enhance the fan experience through advanced analytics and location services. The project also extends to new sports facilities and a High-Performance Center, positioning the stadium at the forefront of technological innovation in sports.

feed.title: Are financial experts on Wall Street forecasting that Consolidated Edison shares will rise or fall?
feed.summary: Consolidated Edison (ED) shares have outperformed the S&P 500 and the utilities sector over the past year. The company recently announced its 52nd consecutive annual dividend increase. While analysts have a consensus "Hold" rating, the highest price target suggests a potential upside, despite the current share price being above the average target.
